items.text:
📍 NRW / Ruhrgebiet / Düsseldorf / Köln und Umgebung

Hallo zusammen,

ich bin Hobbyfotograf aus dem Raum Krefeld/Düsseldorf und suche Menschen, die Lust haben, mal ganz entspannt vor der Kamera zu stehen.

Wichtig vorweg: Ich suche keine Profi-Models und auch keine erfahrenen Models. Mir geht es eher um Menschen, die selbst noch nicht viel oder vielleicht noch gar keine Erfahrung mit Fotoshootings haben. Also gerne Anfängerinnen und Anfänger – passend dazu bin ich in dem Bereich selbst auch noch dabei, mich weiterzuentwickeln.

Das Shooting soll locker und ohne Druck ablaufen. Wir schauen gemeinsam, was gut wirkt, probieren verschiedene Perspektiven aus und nehmen uns einfach die Zeit, die man braucht. Es geht nicht um Perfektion, Modelmaße oder gestellte Hochglanzbilder, sondern um natürliche Fotos.

Der Ort kann gemeinsam ausgesucht werden, zum Beispiel:

• Park oder Natur  

• Wasser / See  

• Stadt / Architektur  

• oder einfach ein Ort, an dem du dich wohlfühlst

Die Bilder bekommst du natürlich in hoher Auflösung. Einige Bilder bearbeite ich zusätzlich leicht und natürlich.

Mir ist wichtig:

Figur, Größe, Alter oder Aussehen spielen für mich keine Rolle. Ich finde, dass jeder Mensch auf Fotos interessant wirken kann, wenn die Atmosphäre passt.

Ich bin im Umkreis von etwa 50–60 km rund um Krefeld/Düsseldorf mobil.

Wenn du Lust hast, das einfach mal auszuprobieren, schreib mir gerne kurz eine Nachricht.

items.text:
Vatertagsgedicht für Deinen Papa, Deinen Vater, wenn Worte fehlen ... Worte, wenn Dir selbst die Stimme fehlt 

Zum Vatertag spreche ich, Christian Weiße aus Köln, ein Gedicht für alle, die ihrem Vater etwas Echtes sagen möchten, aber selbst nicht wissen, wie sie beginnen sollen. Es geht um Frieden, Wahrheit, Fragen statt Urteile und um eine Chance auf mehr Verständnis. 

Ein Gedicht für Nähe ohne falsche Harmonie 

Dieses Video ist kein perfekter Gruß und kein fertiges Familienmärchen. Es ist ein ehrlicher Impuls für Väter und Kinder, die spüren, dass Liebe nicht laut urteilen muss. Manchmal beginnt Veränderung damit, erst zu fragen, bevor man über den anderen entscheidet. 

Teilen, wenn andere Worte brauchen 

Du darfst dieses Vatertagsgedicht gern weiterleiten, wenn Dir selbst die Worte fehlen oder jemand in Deinem Umfeld heute genau diesen Impuls braucht. Vielleicht erreicht ein geteiltes Video einen Vater, der zuhören möchte, oder ein Kind, das endlich friedlich sprechen will. 

Wenn Dich dieses Vatertagsgedicht berührt, teile es mit Deinem Vater oder mit einem Menschen, dem heute die richtigen Worte fehlen, like das Video und schreib in die Kommentare, welche Zeile Dich am meisten bewegt. 

Christian Weiße 

#Vatertagsgedicht #Vatertag #VaterSohn #EhrlicheWorte #ChristianWeisse

items.previewTitle: Holy Days - Evelyn Burdecki und das Rätsel Himmelfahrt - hier anschauen

items.text:
TV Casting Call 

Are you based in Kent?

Are you an outstanding character?

Do you have what it takes to appear in an international TV series about the inner workings of a luxury destination?

Are you available from June-September?

If the answer to all of this is YES, get in touch!

We are looking for confident, fun, outgoing and outspoken people who would like to appear in a returning TV series following the life of a local castle in Kent. Experience working in hospitality is a bonus!

If you’re interested, please send a short video introducing yourself and sharing your story to imatthews@drm2.com.Please include your full name, age, telephone number,  location and social media handle.

Privacy Policy: https://drm2.com/PrivacyNotice/

items.text:
ETHAN GREEN'S NIGHTMARE - EXTRAS CASTING CALL
UNPAID

Filming in Surbiton 25/5/26-28/5/26

'On the morning of his history exam, a promising student oversleeps and finds himself trapped in a nightmare of his school — empty halls, locked doors, and choices that blur the line between failure and oblivion.'

Hello everyone, I'm a student filmmaker currently working on a surreal horror short film set in an empty, anxiety ridden, school. 

We're currently in need of extras, so if you're local to the area of Surbiton or Surrey and fit the look of a student, sending an application would be highly appreciated. 

We can't offer any pay, other than reimbursement of catering and travel costs. 

Send applications and portfolios to Rowangouk@gmail.com. I hope to hear from any individuals that may resonate with this story and be happy to help!

items.text:
CASTING CALL — Male Model / Creator for Father’s Day UGC Content (London)

We’re currently looking for a male model/content creator to portray a “dad” role in some relaxed UGC-style content for a maternity & baby care brand

This is social media content only — no acting experience needed at all. The filming style is very natural, casual and lifestyle-focused

Main shooting scenes will be simple everyday moments such as:
• Cleaning baby bottles with a bottle washer  
• Tidying/cleaning around the house  
• Casual home-life “dad” moments  
etc.

Location:
Central London

Shoot Date:
This Saturday, 16th May

Time:
1pm–3pm

Rate:
£30/hour

The shoot is very chill and low pressure — mainly just following simple directions and natural actions

If interested, please DM me with:
• Your profile/socials
• A few recent photos/videos
• Your contact details (WhatsApp preferred)

## **Free acting taster class!**

**VISIT ACTORSCAFE.CO.UK AND CLICK THE FREE TASTER CLASS TAB.**
## **SIGN UP TO OUR SPotlight Listed COURSES TODAY, SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICKLY!**

**For all ages 18-80! and all acting abilities from novice to professional. Students are achieving their Spotlight accreditation, landing acting agents, and are developing strong confidence and realism in their craft.**

**Students have previously booked for TV Roles (BBC / ITV / Channel 4) commercials, Independent Feature Films, Short Films, voice dubbing (Netflix / Sky) and have landed fringe theatre productions.**

*CAMILLA ARTHUR CASTING "A massive 'hats off' to you and your team - and thank you. I am blown away with your teaching and your approach and just your generosity of spirit. I loved it."*

Venue: Watford, Finsbury Park, Chelmsford

Dates: May 2026

See actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class

**Professional Acting Tuition For All. Our Courses Teach Beginners to Advanced / Spotlight Actors.**

*ALEX SCANLAN. CAM ACTOR'S AGENCY - "Having visited the Actor's Cafe on three separate occasions now, I can really see the great work it produces."*

*CARL PROCTOR. CASTING DIRECTOR -"Everyone seemed to get a lot out of it. A nice group who seem to benefit hugely from you courses."*

*PAUL GIDDINGS. BBC TV DIRECTOR - "Thanks for having us at The Actors Cafe and for creating such a relaxed, positive and supportive environment."*

Apply at [actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class]

items.text: Come see Jerry's Girls at No Square Theatre in Laguna Beach!

sharedPost.text:
Don't miss the wonderful world of Jerry's Girls! Come join us for a fun night out where you'll be sure to be laughing and humming along to some of the greatest golden age musical theatre numbers! 

Tickets available at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

In this dynamic musical revue, three Divas and three singing and dancing women celebrate the music of Jerry Herman, highlighting the broad spectrum of thrilling material he wrote specifically for female performers. This Broadway hit features all the best songs for women from such immortal musicals as Mame, Hello Dolly!, Milk and Honey, Mack and Mabel, A Day in Hollywood/A Night in the Ukraine, and La Cage Aux Folles.

It affectionately celebrates his special gift for writing songs that capture the true spirit of the American musical theatre. The all-female cast will remind us of how Jerry Herman has given voice to some of the most iconic roles, ballads and show-stoppers ever written for Broadway. A winner of the Tony, Grammy, Olivier, and Drama Desk Awards, Jerry Herman is the master tunesmith of our time.

items.text:
Hi Everyone! My name is Nick, and I am a former actor now pursuing a doctorate in clinical psychology. I am conducting a research study titled “Trauma in Training: The Psychological Consequences of Abusive Practices in Acting Programs,” which examines the impact of abusive practices on actors’ mental health during their training. I am currently seeking participants for a survey. If you are interested, participation in this study will involve completing a demographic questionnaire and three brief mental health measures. You will also have the option to provide additional details about your experiences if you wish to share them. Completion of the survey and questionnaires should take approximately 20 minutes.

**Even though it focuses on actors, I am also looking for non-actors to participate. **

To participate in this study, you must be at least 18 years of age, reside in the United States, be able to provide informed consent, and be able to read and understand English. All survey responses will be anonymous. Participation is voluntary and can be discontinued at any time and for any reason without consequences.

Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could share this survey with others. The more responses I get, the better!

**What are the risks of participating?**

Participants who have experienced physical, emotional, and/or sexual abuse may experience psychological discomfort and/or distress in the process of answering questions related to past experiences.

**What are the benefits of the study?**

There is no direct benefit to participating in this study. However, you will nonetheless contribute to existing research on the psychological issues facing actors, particularly during their training. This may be useful in developing more effective training methods and mental health resources for individuals working and training in the performing arts.

If you have any questions about this, feel free to DM me. Thanks in advance for your time!

items.text:
Casting Call
Short title: Mistaken By Bliss 

Role: “Rou” - 30-40ish beauty. Smart. Naturally funny and a bit sarcastic. Unassuming. Naturally flirty. Woman.

Headline; “Raymond“ hires “Rou” to be his assistant. She was referred by a friend of a friend and their relationship becomes more than business.  “Rou” has labeled herself his ‘work wife’. 

“Raymond” has already been cast. He’s a seasoned African-American male from Atlanta. 

Shoot: May 17 @8:30am in Riverdale GA 

Unpaid. 

IMDb credit, lunch, on set snacks and gas stipend will be provided 

EMAIL : toccarrajamesproductions@gmail.com to apply

sharedPost.text:
Wow 😮 Amazing talent! ❤️❤️ 😮 The Shen Yun dancers performing under the California sun is so beautiful.
⚡️ Trust me — you'll want to see it live. Don't miss the magical and captivating experience of a live performance.
🎟️ Visit https://1kb.link/qJDkdm for theater and ticket information 💫 Allow yourself to feel something unforgettable.
💛 You deserve it all.
Have a day full of joy and happiness ✨

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬**

Role: University Professor
Gender: Male
Age Range: 40–55
Ethnicity: Caucasian

We are casting for a brief but meaningful role in an upcoming feature film. The character is a university professor whose assistant is once again late for work, and he is clearly unimpressed. Although there is no dialogue, the role carries emotional depth and strong screen presence.

📍 Location: **Surrey City Library, Surrey, BC**
📅 Shoot Date: **May 24, 2026**
⏰ Time: **10:00 AM – 11:00 AM**

This is a volunteer/unpaid position. Crafty and screen credits will be provided.

We are looking for someone expressive, natural, and comfortable conveying emotion through performance without dialogue.

Please send headshots and any acting reels/experience if available to **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
***Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org

Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

#auditions #play #summer #actors

She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter. SEND US YOUR HEADSHOT AND RESUME BY MAY 20'

items.text:
Hello everyone,

We're a team of 18 industry professionals, from actors, editors, camera ops, DOPs, composers, directors, writers, independent filmmakers, post sound, gaffers, producers and production assistants who have all come together to enter the Manchester 48hr film project on the 16th-17th of this month. 

We’re looking for a sound recordist/sound mixer with their own kit to join our team for the challenge. 

We’ve already got a strong crew across all other departments, and have an experienced boom operator but unfortunately he doesn't have his own kit. With sound being one of the most important parts of any film, we’re really hoping to bring someone passionate and skilled on board.
As part of the festival rules, this is a purely collaborative passion project, no payment is allowed for cast or crew — it’s all about creativity, teamwork, and making the best film possible within 48 hours. This is something as creatives we are all passionate about, so have come together as one big team to have a fun weekend getting truly creative.

It’s a fantastic opportunity to work with a dedicated team, create something under pressure, and be part of an internationally recognised competition. If we win locally, the film goes on to compete internationally, with finalists having the chance to screen at the Cannes Film Festival.
Sound recordist would only be required on the 16th as that is shoot day. 

The film will then be screened at the Vue cinema in Manchester on the 30th may as part of the festival.

If you’re interested, or know someone who might be a good fit, please get in touch.
Thanks,
Chris

items.text:
Ganz großes Kino für echte Sichtbarkeit 

Dass direkt unterhalb unseres gestrigen Vorstellungsvideos von Luis Sedig nun auch kino.de erscheint, zeigt genau, worum es bei Karrideo geht: Darsteller nicht nur online stellen, sondern strategisch sichtbar machen. 

Gestern haben wir Luis Sedig in unseren Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Kanälen vorgestellt. Externe Unterstützung erzeugt dabei oft mehr Glaubwürdigkeit als reine Eigenwerbung, weil der Algorithmus unabhängige Einordnung stärker wahrnimmt. 

Seit 2009 haben wir über 1500 kommerzielle Film-, Video- und Imageprojekte realisiert. Genau daraus entsteht die Relevanz, mit der wir Schützlinge, Coachies und Darstellerkollegen sichtbar, hörbar und professionell positionieren. 

Die Einblendung von kino.de ist für uns deshalb mehr als Zufall. Sie zeigt, wie wichtig kluge Platzierung, Videostrategie und externe Sichtbarkeit geworden sind. 

Auch Du kannst kostenfrei Teil davon werden. 

Schreib einfach ganz großes Kino in die Kommentare. 

Das Karrideo Team schaut hin und pusht dann auch Dich, Deine Arbeit oder Dein Profil mit zusätzlicher Aufmerksamkeit. 

Wer sichtbar werden will, braucht manchmal nur die richtige Bühne. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion mit großem Dank an Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation 

#Karrideo #LuisSedig #DarstellerPromotion #Sichtbarkeit #GanzGroßesKino

items.text:
KOMPARSEN GESUCHT für 80er Filmset , 09.05.2026 Hamburg 

(oder 16.05 als Jugendliche einer Schulklasse, Spielalter 15-22)

Hallo alle miteinander,

für meinen Bachelor Abschlussfilm suchen wir noch Komparsen um unser Bild zu füllen. 

Die Szenerie spielt in den 1980er Jahren, dafür suchen wir u.a. Militär Soldaten und Fake-Filmcrew (m/w/d) Komparsen jeden Spielalters (ab 18) 

Wir drehen am 09.05, ganztags in Hamburg Billwerder Billdeich.

Da wir eine studentische freie No-Budget-Produktion sind, können wir leider keine Vergütung oder Aufwandsentschädigung anbieten. 

Dafür haben wir ein großartiges Team mit professionellem Arbeitsklima als auch Film Produktionsstandart und für Catering sowie Verpflegung wird auch gesorgt sein!

Darüber hinaus wird der Film eine offizielle Premiere in einem Hamburger Kino feiern.

Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein?

Gerne per Mail kontaktieren: kurzfilm.schwitzen@gmail.com

Beste Grüße

Mateusz "Mati" Misiarz

topComments.text:
Leider wurde mir dies zu spät angezeigt. 
Dreht ihr noch mehr Filme? Ich bin gelernte Schauspielerin und musste eine Zwangspause machen. Nun möchte ich wieder starten. 

In Instagram findet ihr mich unter franziska.rose.quast 

Ich habe leider nur ein Showreel von 2016 aber hatte im letzten Jahr 3 Drehs als Komparsin und einen Dreh in diesem Jahr, als Kleindarstellerin. 

Gerne würde ich weiterhin als Schauspielerin aktiv sein und (Kurz) Filme drehen. Bin auch aus Hamburg. 

Liebe Grüße Franziska

items.text:
**Casting Call Tagesrolle “Chefin” für studentischen Abschlussfilm “Streng dich mal an!” In Darmstadt**

***Logline "Streng dich mal an!":***

Die Jugendfreundinnen Maya und Katrin verlieren sich: Katrin versinkt im Chaos ihres ADHS und Maya in ihrer toxischen Beziehung. Als Erwachsene begegnen sie sich erneut und es liegt nun an Katrin, die inzwischen gelernt hat, mit ihrem ADHS zu leben, Maya aus ihrer Beziehung zu helfen – insofern diese bereit ist, sich auf sie einzulassen.

***Rollenbeschreibung:***

Katrins Chefin ist Abteilungsleiterin in einem Unternehmen im Buchhandel.

Sie ist eine souveräne, etwas eigene Frau mit einer natürlichen Autorität, die sich durch die Reihen hochgekämpft hat.

Zu Katrin hat sie ein gutes Verhältnis und verlässt sich auf sie als kompetente Mitarbeiterin.

Spielalter: 35-50

Erscheinungsbild: Weiblich gelesen, PoC 

*Dreh*

* **20.05.** in Darmstadt (Bewerber*innen aus der Region bevorzugt)
* Mittags bis früher Abend
* Da es sich um ein studentisches Projekt handelt, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Verpflegung und Fahrtkosten decken wir jedoch.
* 

Bei Interesse meldet euch bitte bis zum 08.05. mit einem Link zu eurem reel unter sdma.kurzfilm@gmail.com !

***Rollenbeschreibung:***

Katrins Chefin ist Abteilungsleiterin in einem Unternehmen im Buchhandel.

Sie ist eine souveräne, etwas eigene Frau mit einer natürlichen Autorität, die sich durch die Reihen hochgekämpft hat.

Zu Katrin hat sie ein gutes Verhältnis und verlässt sich auf sie als kompetente Mitarbeiterin.

Spielalter: 35-50

Erscheinungsbild: Weiblich gelesen, PoC 

*Dreh*

* **20.05.** in Darmstadt (Bewerber*innen aus der Region bevorzugt)
* Mittags bis früher Abend
* Da es sich um ein studentisches Projekt handelt, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Verpflegung und Fahrtkosten decken wir jedoch.
* 

Bei Interesse meldet euch bitte bis zum 08.05. mit einem Link zu eurem reel unter sdma.kurzfilm@gmail.com !
items.title: **Casting Call Tagesrolle “Chefin” für studentischen Abschlussfilm “Streng dich mal an!” In Darmstadt**

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON – THEATRE – PROFIT SHARE

We are casting for a new revival/adaptation of **Sophocles’ Antigone**, presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**. Following the successful earlier staging of the production in April, we are now seeking new actors due to the unavailability of some previous cast members. We are looking for performers who are ready to jump straight into an active rehearsal process and work within a fast-paced ensemble environment.

Performances will take place on **8th and 9th August 2026** at the **Barons Court Theatre, London**.

This is an **independent, low-budget profit-share production**, developed by producer and actress **Ioanna Firaku** and director/co-producer **Una Reitere**. Performers will be paid through shared ticket-sale profits. While finances are modest, we are committed to creating a focused, collaborative, and artistically ambitious production.

ROLES AVAILABLE                                                                                                    

Creon, Teiresias/Guard and Haemon

We strongly encourage performers of all backgrounds, ethnicities, genders, and abilities to apply. Casting will be inclusive and non-traditional, and all performers should be open to collaborative ensemble and chorus work.

As this production has already undergone an initial development and performance process, we are especially interested in actors who are adaptable, proactive, and confident learning material quickly.

Some roles are text-heavy and require strong memorisation skills, emotional range, physicality, and stamina.

REHEARSALS & PERFORMANCE

* Rehearsals will take place **in person in Highgate, London**.
* Rehearsal dates will be confirmed following casting selections, but rehearsals are expected to take place across **May, June, July and first week of August 2026***.
* Performances will take place on **8th & 9th August 2026**.
* Venue: **Barons Court Theatre, London**.
* Production presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**.

TO APPLY

Please email **antigone.production2026@gmail.com **with:

* The role(s) you would like to be considered for
* A headshot and CV and/or Spotlight link

Selected applicants will be sent a short self-tape audition script.

**Application deadline:** 20/05/2026 midnight

If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out via email.

Thank you,
**Una & Ioanna**

items.text:
CASTING CALL: SHORT FILM/UNPAID

LOOKING FOR MALE ACTORS 

Title: Guardian@ngel

Type: short film

Role descriptions:
Fan, any ethnicity 
CEO, appearing age 40-50
Siwoo, appearing age 19-25
Ideally these characters are Korean, but anyone of East Asian decent is welcome to audition, CEO and Manager are primarily faceless and Siwoo is more just to take a few photos for a “scandal” 

Location: Frankston area, Melbourne 

Dates: Filming will be during the 27th of June – 13th of July, it shouldn’t take more than four days to film everything. Time of day isn’t the most relevant so we can also film in afternoons! I’m happy to negotiate when filming takes place within this time period. The character of Angel has the largest time commitment.

Apply: If interested please contact me before the 17th of May by leaving a comment on this post or contacting me at misramiranda@gmail.com for further information!

Basic plot: The film is a psychological horror that looks at parasocial relationships within the K-Pop industry. Focusing on the main character, a female idol with the stage name “Angel” as one of her fan’s develops a parasocial relationship with her that ends up crossing the line. Offstage, “Angel” is under pressure from her company’s CEO and Manager to fit beauty standards regarding her weight.

items.text:
# 🎬【URGENT】CASTING CALL — PAID COMMERCIAL🎬

【TAPE REQUIRED】 Non-Union | Paid | Commercial for a Messaging App  

Shoot Window: Around May 20–24, TBD  

Location: GTA  

Shoot Length: 2-day shoot overall

Project Description:  

This commercial follows a group of teenage boys through their after-school soccer activities. The story focuses on friendship, connection, and the emotional bond between three teens as they navigate youth, teamwork, and growing up together.

Talent who can believably play ages 14–17 are also welcome to submit.

---

Role 1 — Lead Boy / “Ethan”   Day rate: 600

Male, 14–17, or can believably play 14–17  

Ethnicity open  

American / North American teen vibe  

Lead role — expected to be needed for both shoot days  

Must have strong acting ability and be comfortable with emotional expression on camera.

Audition / Self-Tape Prompt — Role 1:  

Please submit a 45–60 second self-tape in English.

Scenario:  

You are moving away tomorrow. While packing, you find your old soccer cleats and an old photo with your friends. You open a group chat and type: “One last practice?” but you hesitate before sending it.

Please show the moment naturally, with one spoken line:

“I don’t know if they still care.”

We are looking for someone who can express a quiet, sincere, bittersweet emotion on camera — not an overly dramatic performance.

Optional: If you play soccer, you may also include a short soccer clip.

---

Role 2 — Friend 1  Day rate:450

Male, 14–17, or can believably play 14–17  

Ethnicity open

Canadian / local friend vibe  

Expected to be needed for 1 shoot day

Audition / Self-Tape Prompt — Role 2:  

Please perform a 15–20 second silent moment: you arrive at the field and see an old friend again. Show warmth, happiness, and a slightly bittersweet feeling, as if this may be one of your last games together.

Optional: If you play soccer, please include a short soccer clip.

---

Role 3 — Friend 2  Day rate:450

Male, 14–17, or can believably play 14–17  

Latino / Hispanic preferred, but open  

Mexican / Latin football energy  

Expected to be needed for 1 shoot day

Audition / Self-Tape Prompt — Role 3:  

Please perform a 15–20 second silent moment: you arrive at the field and see an old friend again. Show warmth, happiness, and a slightly bittersweet feeling, as if this may be one of your last games together.

Optional: If you play soccer, please include a short soccer clip.

---

Looking for natural, expressive teen actors who are comfortable on camera.

To Submit, please include:  

- Name  

- Age  

- Recent photo  

- Demo reel / acting experience if available  

- Self-tape based on the prompt above  

- Parent/guardian contact info if under 18  

- General availability around May 20–24  

- Optional soccer clip if available

Email: avery@rangerfilms.studio  

Subject: intent commercial - [Role]

items.title: Hello,

items.text:
FIRST CLASS FREE! - Thursday 14/05 7-8pm

Mondays 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3)

Both classes are BRAND NEW ROUTINES so it’s a great time to jump and start fresh! 🙌

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FEMALE ACTORS WANTED 🎬
We’re casting females for an upcoming independent film project looking for bold, fearless personalities with chaotic, goofy, savage energy.

💋 Think:

🔪 Psycho / killer vibe

🃏 Wild & unpredictable personality

🤣 Funny, fearless chemistry

💄 Harley Quinn type energy

🔥 Female gang / dark humor aesthetic

✨ ALL RACES WELCOME ✨

🎭 No acting experience needed

🔞 Must be 21+

⭐ IMDb Credit Included

💰 Unpaid passion project

📍 Filming Date: MAY 13

📍 Location Las Vegas location & filming time provided day of shoot

We’re looking for girls who are:

✔ Comfortable on camera

✔ Able to play aggressive/funny roles

✔ Good with teamwork & energy

✔ Ready to bring crazy characters to life

📩 DM TO AUDITION

Send:

• Name

• Age

• Photos

• Social media (if any)

• Acting experience (optional)

🖤 Serious inquiries only.

DM for any additional questions or details.

“We Make Our Own Rules.” 🖤

#CastingCall #FemaleActors #IndieFilm #ActingOpportunity #Casting #FilmProject #IMDb #LasVegasCasting #ActressWanted

items.text:
We're in Vancouver!
Hello Hollywood North! Howard here from Repunzel (https://www.instagram.com/repunzelforactors/), and I was sent here by one of your actors on the r/VancouverActors subreddit.

We are an agent submission app that's pretty popular in the US and we've been getting quite a few requests for lists outside of the US markets, so we made one for our neighbors to the north! We are now looking for a few beta testers for our Vancouver Agent List.

**Details:**

The beta test is completely free. You'll have full access to the app with all features unlocked.

We're looking for 5-10 Vancouver actors with all varying degrees of experience who are looking for representation.

You can be unrepresented or looking to change your representation.

Actors of color are very encouraged to apply!

You'll be asked to give some brief feedback about the experience afterwards.

‎

https://forms.gle/TSMKLvMSZagC8rrG9

‎

If you have any questions about the beta or the service in general, feel free to DM me.

Looking forward to helping a few actors on here get some fantastic representation!

Thank you!

Howard

items.text:
Documentary

Adults 60+

Volunteer 

I’m developing a small independent documentary project in Vancouver about older adults who have something they want to do, try, learn, experience, or share.  

The goal is not achievement — just honest human stories.

I’m looking for people around 60+ who may be interested in having a conversation and potentially participating in the documentary.

This is a small volunteer-based independent project with no acting experience required.

If interested, please send an email to **pikedreamsfilms@gmail.com** You’re also welcome to send a short video introducing yourself and sharing something you would still like to do, experience, or express in your life.

topComments.text: I am 70 next weekend the 23 of May and was in Canadian Army Reserve in 1976 era and now a Lions Club member for last 46 years, a Mason for 25 years and also a Shriner before Covid happened. . Also a Scout leader in 1978 and 79 before Lions club. I am a very proud Canadian. Besides i wasn't even a Canadian citizen but got into the Canadian forces..I am keen on working with you and your organization. Thanks.
I am just 50 but I like to do this volunteer, can I ?

items.text:
Hi everyone,

After two years of Monday classes in Walthamstow, we’re excited to announce that we’re expanding to **three acting classes** in our **new permanent space** in Clapton (10 min walk from Clapton Overground)!

This is for experienced actors looking for a community and space to work on their craft.

Here, you won’t be learning the top 5 tips to book the role. That’s completely valid but there are other classes for that. This is about getting back in touch with a type of acting that gets the artistic heart pumping. One of connection, simplicity and play. Working on scenes from great plays and developing as an artist.

As a group, we’ve also created and produced multiple projects over the years and will continue doing more. TOAST comedy series was made entirely from actors in the class - [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z_-McVm3wkc](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Z_-McVm3wkc) Community matters deeply to us, and we know many actors are still looking for theirs.

**JUNE SESSION**

Classes run in 4-week blocks.

**8 actors max**, so everyone gets plenty of time to work.

**Mondays:** 1, 8, 15, 22
**Tuesdays:** 2, 9, 16, 23
**Wednesdays:** 3, 10, 17, 24

**6pm–9pm**

**£60 total (£15 per class)**

This is intentionally affordable. We want to make serious acting training accessible to artists. We’re building something honest, safe, and creatively fulfilling.

If you’d like to sign up, or receive info about future classes, get in touch.

Please feel free to forward this to actors who might be interested.

Mark Ryder

eastlondonplayers@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'EAST LONDON PLAYERS june acting sessions monday class tuesday class 1, 1,8, 15, 22nd 2, 2,9, 9, 16, 23th wednesday class 3, 10, 16, 24th SCENE WORK 8 actors per class 6-9 £60 total £15/class paradise works 142 Lea Bridge Road E5 9RB eastlondonplayers@gmail.com'

items.title: Hi everyone,

items.text:
The secret to success?

Showing up for yourself consistently.

Even when you’re tired.
Even when nobody is clapping.
Even when progress feels slow.

Because the people who change their lives are usually the people who refuse to disappear when things get difficult. 🎬

Stop waiting to “feel ready”.
Show up anyway.

➡️ linktr.ee/mattzina

#ActorLife #MindsetShift #ActingCareer #SuccessMindset #SelfDevelopment

items.summary:
The secret to success?

Showing up for yourself consistently.

Even when you’re tired.
Even when nobody is clapping.
Even when progress feels slow.

Because the people who change their lives are usually the people who refuse to disappear when things get difficult. 🎬

Stop waiting to “feel ready”.
Show up anyway.

➡️ linktr.ee/mattzina

#ActorLife #MindsetShift #ActingCareer #SuccessMindset #SelfDevelopment
items.title: The secret to success?

🎬ZABŁYŚNIJ NA EKRANIE!🎬
Masz dyplom szkoły aktorskiej - być może właśnie Ciebie szukamy! ❤️‍🔥
Do cyklicznego serialu realizowanego we Wrocławiu poszukujemy aktorek i aktorów po szkołach filmowych oraz teatralnych
Każda rola to główna postać jednego odcinka! 
👉Zdjęcia realizowane są w różnych terminach, zgłoś się, porozmawiajmy - znajdziemy odpowiedni termin na zdjęcia właśnie dla Ciebie ☺️

👉Stawka: 3000 zł za 3 dni zdjęciowe
👉Zapewniamy hotel oraz zwrot kosztów dojazdu
👉Nowa ekipa, nowe wyzwania i świetna atmosfera na planie!

💌 Z G Ł O S Z E N I A :
AKTORZY@UNAGIMEDIA.PL
Lub bezpośrednio przez link do formularza:
https://forms.gle/CjZENrahxhbhe7Hd8

Prześlij:
✔️ aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki
✔️ wideowizytówkę
✔️ dyplom ukończenia studiów + link do Filmu Polskiego
✔️ numer telefonu kontaktowego
Szukamy ciekawych osobowości i świeżej aktorskiej energii NA PLAN 🎤
Wrocław czeka właśnie na Ciebie!

Udostępnij dalej , a może ktoś czeka na taką szansę!🥰

items.text:
Uwaga! Masz jeszcze szansę dołączyć do Tajemnic 2.0 i to w niższej cenie❗️

🎭Tydzień pracy z mistrzami sztuki teatralnej, w miejscu, które od lat odwiedzają Twoi idole, artyści, filozofowie, ludzie sztuki. Zostaw świat zewnętrzny i sprawdź co masz w środku!

🎭 Dostaniesz wskazówki bezpośrednio od Krzysztofa Jasińskiego, zaśpiewasz z Beatą Rybotycką. Będzie praca z ciałem, joga, etiudy, wykłady, teoria, praktyka. 

🎭Niewielka grupa uczestników = intymna, bezpieczna atmosfera, gdzie każdy zostanie zobaczony, usłyszany, każdy będzie mógł zadać pytanie, na które dostanie wyczerpującą odpowiedź. 

‼️ Zapisz się do końca tygodnia aby załapać się na niższą cenę warsztatu! Ostatnia taka okazja ‼️

🎭Zostały dwa tygodnie - zdążysz się przygotować! Nie wahaj się, warto 🙂 jeśli chcesz zdawać do szkoły teatralnej, poszerzyć warsztat, rozpocząć przygodę z teatrem, zdobyć nowe doświadczenie, spróbować pracy z profesjonalistami, jeśli kochasz teatr - ten warsztat jest dla Ciebie. Nie musisz mieć dużego doświadczenia.

🎭Napisz do nas lub skomentuj słowem TEATR.

To moment dla Ciebie!! 🙂

Do zobaczenia niebawem 🎭

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – MPP CHARACTER ENTERTAINMENT ✨
⭐ MALE PERFORMERS WANTED ⭐

MPP Character Entertainment is looking for talented male performers to bring our exciting character roles to life! Join our professional entertainment team performing as superheroes, cowboys, pirates and more at parties, events and immersive experiences.

🎭 ABOUT THE ROLEWe are casting performers with:• Strong characterisation and improvisation skills• High-energy, engaging performances• Confidence interacting with children and families

🤠 PERFORMER REQUIREMENTS• Full UK driving licence and access to a car• Outgoing, reliable and energetic personality• Weekend availability preferred• Based in or able to travel across Manchester / North West• Performance experience preferred but not essential

🌟 WHAT WE OFFER• Great rates of pay• Flexible freelance work• Supportive and creative team environment• Exciting themed events and performance opportunities

📸 HOW TO APPLYPlease send your CV and headshot/photo to:manager@mppcharacterentertainment.com

items.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.

You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette

Science Boffins

items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Hochzeit gesucht / Zürich, Schweiz 

Für ein studentisches Fotoprojekt und Film suche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Hochzeit im Kanton Zürich. Vorkenntnisse oder eine bestimmte berufliche Tätigkeit sind nicht erforderlich.

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet im Mai/Juni statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. Für Essen und Getränke ist selbstverständlich gesorgt.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of amaranth and wedding

topComments.text: Wo genau findet das Projekt statt... gibt es eine Unterkunft... Fahrspesen??? lg Anna

Für einen offenen Mitmach-Workshop am 27.6. vor dem Rathaus in Gladbeck suchen wir aktuell weitere Tanzdozent:innen, Trainer:innen und Choreograf:innen aus Commercial, Urban Dance, Hip-Hop und ähnlichen Styles. items.text:
🔥 Get ready for the return of Hollywood’s most rugged action icon! 🔥

The wait is finally OVER! We are absolutely thrilled to drop the exclusive first-look cinematic poster for **Jaxon Hale**’s next blockbuster thriller. 💥 At 34, Jaxon is looking peak action hero in this stunning, ultra-realistic 4K visual. That signature square jaw, intense steel-blue stare, and rugged stubble tell you *exactly* what kind of ride we’re in for. 👊

Captured mid-shot in a smoky, war-torn city street at dusk, the atmosphere in this poster is palpable. The dramatic orange and blue cinematic lighting casts sharp shadows across Jaxon as he stands ready for battle in tactical gear. The shallow depth of field keeps the focus squarely on his confident, battle-hardened expression, contrasting perfectly against the burning cars and blurred skyscrapers in the background.

And that tagline? *Chills.* **HE FOUGHT THE WAR ALONE. BUT THE CITY REMEMBERED HIS NAME.** 🤯 This teases an epic story of resilience, survival, and a hero who refuses to forget. We are officially *hyped*! Jaxon Hale consistently delivers pulse-pounding performances, and *this* looks like his most intense role yet.

Drop a comment below if you’re ready to see Jaxon Hale dominate the screen once again! 👇 Who’s counting down the days with us?

#JaxonHale #ActionStar #NewMoviePoster #TheCityRemembers #HollywoodAction #CinematicMasterpiece #MovieHype #ActionHero #FictionalFilm #GrittyRealism #MustWatch #JaxonHaleFans #ActionThriller #ViralPoster

items.text:
Hello - hope you’re all well! 

I’m 2nd ADing on a vertical drama between 26th May and 4th June and looking to cast Supporting Artists. 

It’s self funded and low pay £70pd and £10 travel but we’re looking for people of all backgrounds and ages. So great if you want to get a bit more experience on set. 

We’re shooting near Gloucester and through the South East (mostly Kent) so looking for people from those areas. 

DA13 0UE 
HR8 1RN 
CT6 7LF 

Please send ‘headshots’ (selfie will do), availability on the above dates, and whether you’d be willing to do some lines. 

Thanks so much 

x

items.text:
CASTING CALL — PAID EDITORIAL PORTRAIT SHOOT

Los Angeles / Hollywood | May 16–19 (exact date TBD) | 4–6 Hours | $150

Seeking: Male talent, 40s–60s

This is a cinematic portrait shoot, not a commercial job. The images are being made as authored editorial work — the kind of photograph that lives on a wall or in a book, not an ad. You will receive full high-resolution images for your own portfolio, acting reel, or personal use.

We are looking for someone who can inhabit a character, not just stand in front of a camera. Presence matters more than looks. The right person has a face that carries history — heavy, weathered, specific. Think less model, more character actor. Early Sopranos energy. The kind of man who looks like he’s been somewhere and isn’t sure where he’s going next.

The shoot takes place at a Hollywood motel. The work is psychological and still — influenced by photographer Philip-Lorca diCorcia. Not fashion. Not commercial. Something quieter and more interior.

The primary setup: a man on the edge of a bed, business suit on, briefcase in hand or at his feet, staring into the corner of the room. That’s the image. Simple, loaded, cinematic. We’ll work through 2–3 variations within the same emotional world.

This role requires stillness and the ability to hold an internal emotional state without performing it. If you’ve ever been told your face does the work — this is that job.

Ideal if you own a dark business suit. Well-worn is better than sharp. Wardrobe can be supplied if needed — just include your measurements when you submit.

Rate: $150 for the session

Full image credit on all published work

High-res selects provided for your portfolio

To submit: send a recent photo (doesn’t need to be professional, just natural) and a brief note about yourself to info@leonardabraham.com

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (TWO LEAD ACTING ROLES)**

**Project Title:** Pill Popper

**Project Type:** Student Short Film

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Director:** Margaret White

**Producer:** Hayden Perlov / Vancouver Film School

**Casting Director:** Margaret White / Hayden Perlov

**Audition Dates:** Self-tapes due by May 22nd 2026

**Audition Location:** Self-tapes only

**Call Back Dates:** May 24th 2026

*Call Back location/time will be shared after reviewing auditions*

**Shooting Dates:** June 6th-7th 2026

**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area

**Rates:** Unpaid. Catering and craft service provided.

**Submission Instructions:** Please email **pillpopper_vfs@outlook.com** for submission instructions and sides and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for.

**Synopsis:**

Iris (female, 20-25) is in the depths of her clinical depression. Despite being against prescription medication, Iris’ depression reaches a point where she decides to take her prescribed medicine

for the first time. While on the medication, Iris’ life becomes healthy and sustainable. One night, spent playing games with her friends, Iris remembers why she was so against medication in the 

first place- the dehumanization she sees in it -and pours hers down the kitchen disposal. Once again unmedicated, Iris’ depression becomes the darkest it’s ever been. Desperate and unknowing what to do, she meets with her psychiatrist who guides her back to taking the prescribed medication.

**Character Breakdowns:**

IRIS

Female/Female Presenting

20-25

Open Ethnicity

Iris is stuck in an apathetic depression. With her medication, she’s thoughtful and gentle, and spends her time contemplating her favorite things. The chemicals are in her brain now, but that doesn’t mean she always feels it in her heart, causing her to sometimes become reserved and melancholic. Still, Iris goes through the motions of her day with a smile on her face and a new level of energy, compliant to her psychiatrist’s instructions.

DR. WELL 

Any Gender

45-65

Open Ethnicity

Dr. Well is a forbearing, well-seasoned psychiatrist who works attentively and conscientiously with patients of all ages. Dr Well’s priority is persistently achieving positive results through their patients. While the patient’s well-being is always at the forefront of Dr. Well’s practice, they diplomatically brush past the patient’s experience to get to the results of the current treatment, always searching for the best outcome.

**Notes:**

(TW) Please note this script contains brief discussion of self harm between Iris and Dr. Well and implied self harm and suicidal ideation for Iris. The topic will be approached sensitively and

compassionately, putting the actors' comfort and well-being first. Keep this in mind when submitting your audition. Resources/contacts will be available throughout production.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - WOMEN (60-75) - NON-UNION COMMERCIAL**

**Seeking WOMEN (60-75) with 30+ BMI for a NON-UNION PHARMA COMMERCIAL shooting in Vancouver, BC!**

***BONUS: Please audition with your partner if possible!***

**NO ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED!**

**SUBMISSION DEADLINE:** ***UPDATED* Monday, May 18 by 11am**

**CALLBACKS:** May 20, 2026

**WARDROBE:** May 29-30, 2026

**RATES:** $600/day + $4000/one year buyout (if you appear in the final cut)

**FILMING:** June 1-3, 2026

**PLEASE EMAIL IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS: **kkstreetcasting@gmail.com

**Please apply through the online form below!**

items.text:
Casting 2 roles!
Title: Headshot

Genre: Horror

Role: 

**NICKY** — Female, early 20s. New to the city, trying to break into acting. Open, polite, eager to be taken seriously. The role lives in reactions: micro-expressions of discomfort she's actively trying to hide, the slow override of her instincts to be agreeable. We need an actress who can play "trying not to seem rude" with real specificity, not big fear. Mostly silent in the back half — must carry the camera on her face alone. Lead role.

**THE PHOTOGRAPHER** — Male, 30s–60s, open ethnicity. Warm, disarming, professional. The kind of person you'd trust on first meeting. Plays the role completely straight — NOT a creep, NOT menacing. The horror comes from how normal he seems. Stillness, quiet confidence, and a genuine smile are more important than any dark energy. Strong listener with precise line delivery. Lead role.

Production Company: CinemaRaven

Production Type: Indie

Contact Information: sam@cinemaravenproductions.com

Run Time: Short

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: I'll send a script for a video audition. Hoping to have this cast by early June. 

Shooting Schedule: June 24-26 (1 rehearsal day TBD, 2 shooting days

Filming Location: Broomfield CO

Project Description: Logline: A young aspiring actress answers a Craigslist ad for free professional headshots and discovers that the photographer's studio hides something far worse than a scam.

items.text:
**Casting Roles for Micro Comedy - Denver DMV**

**PROJECT DESCRIPTION: **

Short-form workplace sitcom that takes place in a “government agency”.  The project will be filmed in a similar style to The Office, Parks & Rec.

**LOGLINE:**

Each day serendipity brings people from all walks of life together at the Denver DMV. A place where those behind the counter are just as annoyed and bewildered as those crammed into plastic chairs awaiting their number to be called.

**FILMING DATE:** TBD

We will be filming 2 days over a weekend either July 18-19 OR Aug. 1-2 in central Denver

**RATE: ** $200/day + 20% agency (10hr)

**USAGE:**  Web, YouTube, Social

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:**  Neato Pictures

**ROLES: ** 

**Janet (F, 60s)**

A local has-been actress now working at the DMV for the last 10 years.  Long after local fame as the ‘84 - ‘86 face of a local dealership, Janet still believes her acting break is just around the corner. Personally driven but not a team player, Janet only works to collect a check.   She is trying to hold onto her youth but her flamboyance often barely covers her insecurities.  

**Carl (M, 50s)**

A no-frills, serious, deliberate man who shows up on time and does everything with purpose. He’s a “lifer” at the DMV having been there over 16 years and doesn’t enjoy change. With a military background, Carl is a man of strict order, tradition, and pride in his work. Rumor has it, Carl was honorably discharged over a chronic case of lock-jaw due to stress. 

**SUBMISSIONS:**  By Monday 5/18

If you have great comedic timing and feel like you might be our Janet or Carl, we'd love to hear from you. 

Please email** Brandy@neatopictures.com** for audition requirements and script.  Thanks for your interest!

topComments.text: Sent you an email with demo reels

items.text:
Now Casting: Princess Performers (Chicago)
We are casting performers to portray princess characters at children’s parties and events.

This role focuses on character acting, storytelling, and creating a high-energy, engaging experience for kids.

Requirements:

• Experience working with children required  

• Strong, expressive personality and ability to stay in character  

• Acting experience preferred  

• Weekend availability  

• Reliable transportation (events take place across Chicagoland, including suburbs)  

• Some days may include multiple events in different locations across Chicagoland (up to 50 miles total travel)  

We provide:

• Professional training  

• Costumes, wigs, and all props  

Pay: $60–$90 per 1-hour event (depending on role and experience)  

Most events are 1 hour.  

Additional travel compensation may be provided for longer distances.

Opportunity:

This is a great opportunity to monetize your performance skills and earn additional income on weekends through fun, creative work with children.

To apply, please send:

• Name  

• Location  

• Weekend availability  

• Brief experience with children and/or performance  

• Recent headshot or clear photo  

Casting process:

1. Short video audition (selected candidates)  

2. In-person casting/interview in Chicago

items.text:
Szczęście sprzyja odważnym – pokaż się przed kamerą! Rusza casting do reklamy totalizatora sportowego!

Zagraj w nowej reklamie i daj się poznać całej Polsce! Super plan i atrakcyjna stawka!

Do najnowszej reklamy znanego totalizatora sportowego:

POSZUKUJEMY:

Rola drugoplanowa “Ola”: kobieta w wieku 25-35 lat, do roli drobnej blondynki. Poszukujemy osób o umiejętnościach tanecznych – rola wymaga zatańczenia choreografii – ewentualnie będzie musiała założyć bikini ale jest o to pytanie w ankiecie.

Rola drugoplanowa “Tomek”: 25-35 lat.  Mile widziana opalenizna lub ciemna karnacja, wysportowana sylwetka oraz ciemne włosy. Poszukujemy  osób o umiejętnościach tanecznych – rola wymaga zatańczenia choreografii. Uwaga układ będzie mega prosty, może być nieudolny. Musi być gotowy na wystąpienie bez koszulki.

Rola epizodyczna “Witek”: mężczyzna w wieku 45-55 lat do roli pracownika korporacji średniego szczebla. Mile widziana sylwetka plus size i jasna karnacja.

Rola epizodyczna “Nina”: kobieta w wieku 20-30 lat do roli przebojowej, odważnej i śmiałej dziewczyny, miłośniczki podróży. Aparat na zębach będzie dodatkowym atutem.

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA (wizytówka + nagranie)
 
Wizytówka po polsku 
+ Opowiedz co zrobisz jak wygrasz 300.000 zł. Podejdź do sprawy realistycznie. To już niezły pieniądz ale nie taki że wariujesz.
Zatańcz do swojej ulubionej muzyki. Na luzie. Wyobraź sobie że tylko ty jesteś na działce i tańczysz dla siebie. Świeci słońce. Jest luz.

Stawka: od 3500zł za dzień zdjęciowy!

TIMING:
15.05 – piątek – termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godz. 22:00
27 i 28.05.2026 – dni zdjęciowe

Ogłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + video proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

 Link do castingu:
www.unagimedia.pl/pl/casting048/

Temat: 048

To jak? Wchodzisz do gry? Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

Rola epizodyczna “Witek”: mężczyzna w wieku 45-55 lat do roli pracownika korporacji średniego szczebla. Mile widziana sylwetka plus size i jasna karnacja.

Rola epizodyczna “Nina”: kobieta w wieku 20-30 lat do roli przebojowej, odważnej i śmiałej dziewczyny, miłośniczki podróży. Aparat na zębach będzie dodatkowym atutem.

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA (wizytówka + nagranie)
 
Wizytówka po polsku 
+ Opowiedz co zrobisz jak wygrasz 300.000 zł. Podejdź do sprawy realistycznie. To już niezły pieniądz ale nie taki że wariujesz.
Zatańcz do swojej ulubionej muzyki. Na luzie. Wyobraź sobie że tylko ty jesteś na działce i tańczysz dla siebie. Świeci słońce. Jest luz.

Stawka: od 3500zł za dzień zdjęciowy!

TIMING:
15.05 – piątek – termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godz. 22:00
27 i 28.05.2026 – dni zdjęciowe

Ogłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + video proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

 Link do castingu:
www.unagimedia.pl/pl/casting048/

Temat: 048

To jak? Wchodzisz do gry? Czekamy na Twoje zgłoszenie!

items.text:
Casting do znanej sieci restauracyjnej typu fast food!

! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ! SZALONY PLAN ! 

Do kampanii znanej sieci restauracyjnej:

POSZUKUJEMY: 

1. ROLA GŁÓWNA - DZIEWCZYNA

Dziewczyna - wiek 23–27 lat — naturalna, nonszalancka, „wiecznie online”. Typ trendsetterki z liceum: zawsze na bieżąco z premierami, muzyką i wydarzeniami. Charyzmatyczna, autentyczna, mówi prosto do kamery i wciąga widza do swojego świata. Każda etniczność mile widziana.

Epizody:

Kobiety i mężczyźni - wiek 20-35 lat - nasza ekipa klientów restauracji, którzy później stają się uczestnikami festiwalu, różnorodna grupa dziewczyn i chłopaków. Mile widziane osoby z poczuciem rytmu. Pochodzenie etniczne nie ma znaczenia. 

CHĘTNIE OSOBY RÓŻNORODNE ETNICZNIE !!!

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA (wizytówka + scenka)

Wizytówka po angielsku - kto da radę, a jak nie to po polsku 🙂

SCENKA: 

ONA: Dziewczyna trzyma w ręku telefon z otwartą apką. Mówi prosto do kamery: „HEJ! Widzisz to? To właśnie tutaj. To nowa apka. Działa właśnie tak." Przeciąga palcem po ekranie. Zamówione rzeczy nagle wyskakują z telefonu i lądują na stole. Ona pozostaje całkowicie naturalna i niewzruszona, jakby to była codzienna sytuacja, ani na moment nie odrywając wzroku od kamery.

Dla epizodów: wizytówki po angielsku (lub polsku) + spontaniczny taniec - wyobraź sobie że jesteś na festiwalu ze znajomymi. Wspólnie się razem bawicie.

STAWKI: od 4500zł za dzień zdjęciowy!

TIMING: 

15.05 - piątek - termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 18.00 

25.05 i/lub 26.05 - zdjęcia w Warszawie

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie i video proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Temat: 46

Link do castingu:
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting046/

Podaj swój talent na tacy, a my zajmiemy się resztą!

items.text:
**Darstellerin für kleine Rapunzel-Szene gesucht 🎬**

Für einen humorvollen Social-Content-Dreh suchen wir eine Darstellerin für eine kurze „Rapunzel“-Szene.

**Wann:** 28.05.
**Wo:** Nähe Stuttgart
**Zeit:** flexibel zwischen 09:00–15:00 Uhr
**Dauer:** ca. 1 Stunde
**Budget:** 100 € 

Die Rolle umfasst nur 2 kurze Szenen:
Du sitzt als Rapunzel vor dem Spiegel, kämmst dir die Haare und sagst genau zwei Worte.

Wichtig wären lange Haare oder ein Look, der gut zu einer Rapunzel-Szene passt. Schauspielerfahrung ist von Vorteil, aber kein Muss — wichtig ist vor allem, dass du dich vor der Kamera wohlfühlst.

Bitte schick bei Interesse:
aktuelle Fotos, deinen Wohnort und kurz deine Verfügbarkeit am 28.05.

Wir freuen uns auf deine Nachricht!

items.text:
Vatertagsgedicht für Deinen Papa, Deinen Vater, wenn Worte fehlen ... Worte, wenn Dir selbst die Stimme fehlt 

Zum Vatertag spreche ich, Christian Weiße aus Köln, ein Gedicht für alle, die ihrem Vater etwas Echtes sagen möchten, aber selbst nicht wissen, wie sie beginnen sollen. Es geht um Frieden, Wahrheit, Fragen statt Urteile und um eine Chance auf mehr Verständnis. 

Ein Gedicht für Nähe ohne falsche Harmonie 

Dieses Video ist kein perfekter Gruß und kein fertiges Familienmärchen. Es ist ein ehrlicher Impuls für Väter und Kinder, die spüren, dass Liebe nicht laut urteilen muss. Manchmal beginnt Veränderung damit, erst zu fragen, bevor man über den anderen entscheidet. 

Teilen, wenn andere Worte brauchen 

Du darfst dieses Vatertagsgedicht gern weiterleiten, wenn Dir selbst die Worte fehlen oder jemand in Deinem Umfeld heute genau diesen Impuls braucht. Vielleicht erreicht ein geteiltes Video einen Vater, der zuhören möchte, oder ein Kind, das endlich friedlich sprechen will. 

Wenn Dich dieses Vatertagsgedicht berührt, teile es mit Deinem Vater oder mit einem Menschen, dem heute die richtigen Worte fehlen, like das Video und schreib in die Kommentare, welche Zeile Dich am meisten bewegt. 

Christian Weiße 

#Vatertagsgedicht #Vatertag #VaterSohn #EhrlicheWorte #ChristianWeisse

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM PROJECT 🎬

We are currently casting REAL ACTORS for an upcoming passion-driven short film project.

This is a VOLUNTEER project, but it offers valuable experience, networking opportunities, exposure, and a chance to be part of something powerful and cinematic.

THE GOOD NEWS IS: We are NOT looking for extras.
We are looking for dedicated actors who can truly perform.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must know how to act confidently
• Must be comfortable performing action/stunt SCENES even if it's your first time. 
• Passion, discipline, and commitment are important
• Team players with positive energy

This project is focused on building strong talent and creating high-quality work together.

📍Location details and full project information will be discussed in person.
🎭 Roles and shoot details will also be discussed directly with selected applicants.

If you believe you have the talent, confidence, and passion for film — contact 0639889467. 

#Casting #actionfilm #shortfilm #SouthAfricanCinema #actionmovie2026

⭐️CASTING CALL – EXTRAS WANTED⭐️
For filming taking place in Opatija on May 26th, we are looking for Asian men and women (from Zagreb or Rijeka area) to work as extras in the role of tourists. Fee is 80,00€ net, filming from early morning to 2pm.

If you are interested, please apply via email at: rijekastatisti@gmail.com

In your application, please include:

* A recent photo

* Height

* Weight

* Clothing size

* Shoe size

* Mobile phone number

We look forward to your applications!

Casting Koke

items.text:
🎬 **PILNY CASTING – SERIAL “IN COLD ICE”**
📍 **Bydgoszcz i okolice**

Szukamy aktorów do serialu **„In Cold Ice”**.
Zdjęcia odbywają się **w języku angielskim**.

📅 Termin zdjęć: **15–18 maja**
🎥 Jeden dzień zdjęciowy na rolę.
🔹 HOKEISTA
* młody mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* wymagana komunikatywna znajomość języka angielskiego
* jedna kwestia po angielsku

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **600 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 OCHRONIARZ
* mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* rola bez kwestii

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **400 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 PASTOR
* mężczyzna w średnim wieku
* bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego
* rola z tekstem

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **1000 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o wiadomość prywatną
i przesłanie od razu:
* krótkiego **self-introduction po angielsku**
* wieku
* aktualnych zdjęć
* doświadczenia aktorskiego (jeśli jest)

🎬 Casting pilny!

Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!)

user.name: Majestic Academy of Performing Arts & Dance - Chester

items.text:
SIXTH FORM PERFORMING ARTS COLLEGE - CHESTER

2 Year Diploma in Professional Musical Theatre & Acting

Qualification Awarded | RSL Level 3 Extended Diploma in Performing Arts for Students Aged 16+
TRAIN | PERFORM | PROGRESS 

We are proud to launch our brand-new Sixth Form Performing Arts College for students aged 16+, designed for passionate performers who want to take their training to the next level while gaining recognised qualifications.

Our sixth form offers a professional, supportive and inspiring environment where students can develop their skills in performance, acting for screen, musical theatre, dance and acting while preparing for future careers in the creative industries.

Whether your goal is drama school, university, professional performance work or building confidence and creativity, our programme is designed to help every student grow both personally and professionally.

Why Choose Our Performing Arts College?

Industry-focused training in performing arts
RSL recognised qualifications
Expert tutors with professional experience
Performance opportunities throughout the year
Small class sizes and personalised support
Development of confidence, teamwork and leadership skills
Preparation for university, drama school auditions and careers in the arts

#SixthForm #PerformingArts #Education #ActingSchool #Chester

items.text:
BACKGROUND CASTING CALL - BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS
Hi!

We are looking for background for our upcoming short film filming May 20th - 22nd, 2026.

We are looking for a DIVERSE RANGE of actors, of all ages 18+, nationalities, and gender identities, to play a wide range of BOWLING ALLEY PATRONS.

Please note this is an unpaid opportunity but you will be provided lots of very delicious food and lunch on set!!

We are filming in Port Coquitlam.

Please let us know which days you are available, you can choose to do only one of the days, two, or all three days!

If interested, please email or DM me or fill out the following form —[ https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6](https://forms.gle/zaSui6WJ2YCMz62E6)

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“SEVEN TIMES, SEVENTH”***

**Director:** Hân Phạm

**Producers:** Shakil Jessa, Alger Ji-Liang

**Category:** Independent Short Film - Funded by BC Arts Council

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh, Hân Phạm

**Union Status:** UBCP/ACTRA ULB

**Compensation:** $150/day. Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-5, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, demo reel/resume (if you have) and tell us a little bit about yourself!

**LOGLINE:** After her death, Bay, a Vietnamese hairdresser, lingers as a spirit in her old salon. Over 49 Days, visits from her loved ones awaken memories of care, regret, and joy—revealing her quiet life as a matriarchal archive of survival and love.

****OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED****

**BAY - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, Late 40s-60s***

Bay is a middle-aged Vietnamese woman who arrived in Canada in the 80s as a boat woman. As the owner of a hair salon, she's hardworking, warm and caring, but is short-tempered and strict towards her staff and her family. Raising a child alone in unfamiliar land as a single mom, she hides the hardships and secrets of her past from her daughter, Dan. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HUONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Huong is a stay-at-home auntie and wife who frequents the beauty salon. She is casual and overly curious, loves gossip, and complains a lot about her husband, but is lighthearted at her core. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Hong is an experienced hairdresser and a friend of Bay. She is kind, understanding and open-minded. She likes to help others resolve conflicts. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

🚨HIRING A SEAMSTRESS🚨
We’re looking for an experienced seamstress to create costumes for our live touring shows across the USA 🇺🇸✨
If you’ve got the energy, experience and creativity to help bring our productions to life, we want to see you!
📩 Apply now
Send your resume, portfolio and experience details to:
👉 casting@taconhyentertainment.com

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'NOW HIRING COSTUME MAKER SEAMSTRESS Taconhy Entertainment is SEEKING an EXPERIENCED COSTUME MAKER SEAMSTRESS to create costumes for live performance shows. WE ARE LOOKING FOR: Experienced costume construction for stage/entertainment productions. Strong skills in tailoring, pattern making, and garment construction. Ability to create durable, high-quality stage costumes. Experience working with performance costumes is highly valued. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE IN: Designing and/or constructing costumes for shows, theater, dance, or live entertainment. Working with stretch, specialty fabrics, and stage-ready materials. Alterations, fittings, and professional finishing details. SEND CURRENT: Resume/ CV Portfolio (photos of previous work) Experience details. casting@taconhyentertainment.co'

items.text:
Joust - Folk Feature Casting Call
Title: Joust

Genre: (Comedy, Drama, Coming of Age)

Logline: Following a self-inflicted break up, a young man spends the summer reflecting on his actions that have had ripple effects beyond his understanding.

Roles:

TESSA - Female, 16-18 - A mostly confident, but aimless and introverted writer. The film is split into three distinct acts, and Tessa is the lead of the third act and co-lead of the second act. Lives a very quiet life, one that is presented as a somewhat aspirational lifestyle to the audience.

BEN - Male, 16-18 - A renaissance faire employee with a somewhat disgruntled but nerdy demeanor. Charming when in the presence of those he is most comfortable with, Ben's entire deal in this movie is that he is in a totally normal relationship and throws it away because his girlfriend seemed disinterested in him in a dream. Co-lead of the first and second acts.

GRACE - 16-18 - A career-driven and charming first year university student, studying experience design. Perceived by Ben as being a distant partner, she's really just going through a stressful period of time. Often switches between appearing as a free spirit in friendships/relationships, but somewhat corporate in professional/academic contexts. Co-lead of the first act.

Production Company: Beacon Releasing (Fully Indie/Folk, Self Produced by Joel Davis Warren)

Production Type: Indie, Folk, Micro-Budget

Contact Information: Inquire at my personal cell via text (719)-246-6149 or email cosummerfilm@gmail.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Unpaid (Free food, reel deliverables, and IMDB/TMDB credits, though!)

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Contact me with either a reel, headshots, resume, or social media profile. One self tape may be requested. No specific due date, so I'll take this post down by the time I'm unable to take any more submissions.

Shooting Schedule: Intermittent shooting over the month of July, will schedule around our lead talent's schedules.

Filming Location: Colorado Springs

Additional Information: This is a folk feature film, meaning it is being entirely made as a hobby project with a very limited cast and crew, made on a VERY low budget. Anyone who can give a natural performance with an emphasis on improv, would be wonderful, regardless of experience level. Actors and non actors alike are welcome. The film will see a direct-to-YouTube release with a planned cast/crew premiere screening within the year. As stated, no financial compensation, so please keep that in mind!

Thanks so much for your time in reading this, and again, if you have any questions, please see the number or email above. :)
items.summary:
Joust - Folk Feature Casting Call
Title: Joust

Genre: (Comedy, Drama, Coming of Age)

Logline: Following a self-inflicted break up, a young man spends the summer reflecting on his actions that have had ripple effects beyond his understanding.

Roles:

TESSA - Female, 16-18 - A mostly confident, but aimless and introverted writer. The film is split into three distinct acts, and Tessa is the lead of the third act and co-lead of the second act. Lives a very quiet life, one that is presented as a somewhat aspirational lifestyle to the audience.

BEN - Male, 16-18 - A renaissance faire employee with a somewhat disgruntled but nerdy demeanor. Charming when in the presence of those he is most comfortable with, Ben's entire deal in this movie is that he is in a totally normal relationship and throws it away because his girlfriend seemed disinterested in him in a dream. Co-lead of the first and second acts.

GRACE - 16-18 - A career-driven and charming first year university student, studying experience design. Perceived by Ben as being a distant partner, she's really just going through a stressful period of time. Often switches between appearing as a free spirit in friendships/relationships, but somewhat corporate in professional/academic contexts. Co-lead of the first act.

Production Company: Beacon Releasing (Fully Indie/Folk, Self Produced by Joel Davis Warren)

Production Type: Indie, Folk, Micro-Budget

Contact Information: Inquire at my personal cell via text (719)-246-6149 or email cosummerfilm@gmail.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Unpaid (Free food, reel deliverables, and IMDB/TMDB credits, though!)

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Contact me with either a reel, headshots, resume, or social media profile. One self tape may be requested. No specific due date, so I'll take this post down by the time I'm unable to take any more submissions.

Shooting Schedule: Intermittent shooting over the month of July, will schedule around our lead talent's schedules.

Filming Location: Colorado Springs

Additional Information: This is a folk feature film, meaning it is being entirely made as a hobby project with a very limited cast and crew, made on a VERY low budget. Anyone who can give a natural performance with an emphasis on improv, would be wonderful, regardless of experience level. Actors and non actors alike are welcome. The film will see a direct-to-YouTube release with a planned cast/crew premiere screening within the year. As stated, no financial compensation, so please keep that in mind!

Thanks so much for your time in reading this, and again, if you have any questions, please see the number or email above. :)

items.text:
Audition Notice “A Midsummer Night’s Dream”
## **Audition Notice**

**“A Midsummer Night’s Dream”**
 By: William Shakespeare
 Directed By: Kytriena Payseno & Gwydion Winkelmeyer

Stage Manager: Wilma Spencer

Produced By: Lyons Community Theater 

Hosted By: The Town of Lyons

**Mission Statement**

LCT exists to establish and promote live theater and other performing arts in order to contribute to the quality of life in Lyons and to build community in doing so.

**Values Statement**

Lyons Community Theatre (LCT) brings people together through the shared joy of storytelling, creativity, and community connection. As a locally rooted, volunteer-powered organization, we create space for residents of all ages and backgrounds to participate in every aspect of theatre—from performing and directing to building sets and supporting behind the scenes.

Our mission is to strengthen community bonds, celebrate local talent, and make the performing arts accessible, inclusive, and welcoming for all. Through engaging productions, hands-on learning opportunities, and meaningful collaborations, LCT provides a place where friendships are formed, creativity flourishes, and everyone has a role to play.

We believe that theatre should reflect the heart of our town—bold, compassionate, connected, and deeply human.

**Auditions:**

Please email a recording of your chosen reading or monologue to [kytriena.lyonscommtheater@gmail.com](mailto:kytriena.lyonscommtheater@gmail.com) 

Due Saturday, May 16th, 2026 @Midnight

Link to [script](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1x9Md7MPKL3ORGgVVCboLAYZzowidZXvF/view?usp=sharing): [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1x9Md7MPKL3ORGgVVCboLAYZzowidZXvF/view?usp=sharing](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1x9Md7MPKL3ORGgVVCboLAYZzowidZXvF/view?usp=sharing) 

**Performance Dates:**
* **Tech Week:** August 9–13, 2026 (Sunday–Thursday)
* **Performances:** August 14 & 15, 2026 (6:30pm) 
* **Strike:** August 15, 2026 (All required to help)

Location: Sandstone Park, 350 4th Ave, Lyons, CO 80540

**Audition Information:**

Roles are **Non-Union | Unpaid**

*LCT encourages actors of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, and abilities to audition. We welcome performers from all backgrounds.*

Auditioners must sign up in advance.

**All auditioners must fill out the audition form. If it is not filled out prior, the auditioner will need to fill it out twice.**

**[Lyons Community Theatre Audition Form](https://forms.gle/AskLHkKGqSP2ET3K8)****: **[https://forms.gle/AskLHkKGqSP2ET3K8](https://forms.gle/AskLHkKGqSP2ET3K8)** **

**Summary of *****A Midsummer Night’s Dream***
*   A Midsummer Night’s Dream* by William Shakespeare is a whimsical comedy about love, magic, and mistaken identity. The story weaves together four young lovers from Athens, a group of amateur actors rehearsing a play, and a mischievous band of fairies living in an enchanted forest.
   When the lovers flee into the woods, they become entangled in a magical feud between the fairy king and queen. With the help (and interference) of the playful sprite Puck, spells are cast that cause people to fall in and out of love in hilarious and unexpected ways. Meanwhile, the bumbling actors prepare a performance that adds even more humor to the tale.
   In the end, the chaos resolves into harmony, and the play celebrates the unpredictable, irrational, and joyful nature of love.
**Character Breakdown / Casting Notes**

* Oberon – King of the Fairies

hej!

ŚLĄSK I OKOLICE 

Wysyłam tym razem info o projekcie non profit. Nie mogę zdradzać nazwiska reżysera ale w zeszłym roku w jego manifeście wzięło udział wiele znanych polskich top modelek, aktorów etc. Projekt jest niekomercyjny. Wybranym osobom będę wysyłała wszystkie info. 

Projekt ma zero budżetu, wszystkie osoby które chciałyby się zaangażować, muszą mieć świadomość, że jest to współpraca bezpłatna.

Postaci będą niemówione, raczej będą mieć reakcje emocjonalne.

**ZDJĘCIA SĄ NA ŚLĄSKU W MIEJSCOWOŚCI ŁAZISKA WIĘC ZAPRASZAMY OSOBY ZE ŚLĄSKA I OKOLIC**

**DATA 23.05.26**

**KOGO SZUKAMY:**

- dziewczyny modelki

- osoby o ciekawej niesymetrycznej urodzie z nietypowymi cechami fizycznymi. Nieregularne rysy, kontrastowi i nieregularni, z różnicami anatomicznymi. - - zawodowe kulturystki w róznym wieku. Będą występować w kostiumie kąpielowym

- kulturyści  w róznym wieku, chętnie starsi, 50+

items.summary:
hej!

ŚLĄSK I OKOLICE 

Wysyłam tym razem info o projekcie non profit. Nie mogę zdradzać nazwiska reżysera ale w zeszłym roku w jego manifeście wzięło udział wiele znanych polskich top modelek, aktorów etc. Projekt jest niekomercyjny. Wybranym osobom będę wysyłała wszystkie info. 

Projekt ma zero budżetu, wszystkie osoby które chciałyby się zaangażować, muszą mieć świadomość, że jest to współpraca bezpłatna.

Postaci będą niemówione, raczej będą mieć reakcje emocjonalne.

**ZDJĘCIA SĄ NA ŚLĄSKU W MIEJSCOWOŚCI ŁAZISKA WIĘC ZAPRASZAMY OSOBY ZE ŚLĄSKA I OKOLIC**

sharedPost.text:
🎭 Uwaga!
Rekrutacja na rok 2026/2027 już trwa — i wcale nie robi cichego wejścia.

Jeśli aktorstwo chodzi Ci po głowie (albo nie daje spać), to:
👉 wchodzisz na stronę
👉 pobierasz formularz
👉 wypełniasz
👉 wysyłasz na: sekretariat@aktorska.warszawa.pl

Proste? Proste. 😎

🎬 Przyjmujemy do 4 niezależnych grup:
• przygotowującej
• otwartej
• zaawansowanej
• teatru muzycznego

⚠️ Miejsc nie ma nieskończenie wiele, a pierwsi kursanci już zostali przyjęci!

Nie zwlekaj — bo ktoś właśnie może zgarniać Twoją rolę 🎭

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – KURZFILM „CARLINA“

Für unseren poetischen Kurzfilm *CARLINA* suchen wir Darsteller*innen für vier zentrale Rollen.

Der Film erzählt von Nähe, Sehnsucht, Verlust und unausgesprochenen Spannungen in der Abgeschiedenheit einer alpinen Bergwelt. Im Mittelpunkt stehen starke emotionale Präsenz, reduziertes Spiel und Ausdruck über Blick, Körpersprache und Stille.

📍 Drehort: Nähe Lunz am See, Niederösterreich
📅 Drehzeitraum: 05.06.2026 – 11.06.2026
🎞 Studentenproduktion / No-Budget
🍽 Unterkunft & Verpflegung vorhanden
🎥 Festival-Einreichungen geplant

Gesucht werden Darsteller*innen für die Rollen:
– Magdalena
– Johann
– Lukas
– Wolfgang

Alle weiteren Informationen zu Rollen, Anforderungen und Projekt findet ihr in den Bildern des Posts.

📩 Bewerbungen bitte bis spätestens **17.05.2026** an:
**hochland.kurzfilm@gmail.com**

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!
