items.text:
CASTING – PAID (URGENT)

Looking for male actors aged roughly 30s–60s for short mock consultation filming for a medical e-learning platform.

Details:
• Marble Arch, London
• Monday 18 May
• Actors will only be needed for a single 1-hour slot
• Mock consultation with a doctor (guided, not scripted)
• £150

Straightforward roleplay scenario. Direction and prompts provided on the day.

Must be comfortable on camera and able to take direction.

If available, please email:
[tom.charnley@dermamedical.co.uk](mailto:tom.charnley@dermamedical.co.uk)

Please include:
• Headshot
• Age
• Location
• Availability

Looking to confirm ASAP.

topComments.text: Hi Tom I work in the NHS so this would be perfect! Have just emailed you 😊
hey, I would be interested... thanks

items.text:
The response to our search for Anne Boleyn in The Falcon’s Last Flight has been truly overwhelming.

Applications are now officially CLOSED and no further submissions will be accepted.

We are delighted to confirm that a number of exceptionally strong candidates have already been selected and contacted regarding imminent auditions for our November premiere performance in Woolwich, London.

Thank you to everyone who expressed an interest in bringing one of Tudor history’s most iconic women to life. The standard of applications has been remarkable.

⚜️ The Falcon’s Last FlightOne night. Two voices. One tower.

PS. To the AI nazi who had to comment that it was a shame it was an AI poster… go Moan elsewhere

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON – THEATRE – PROFIT SHARE

We are casting for a new revival/adaptation of **Sophocles’ Antigone**, presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**. Following the successful earlier staging of the production in April, we are now seeking new actors due to the unavailability of some previous cast members. We are looking for performers who are ready to jump straight into an active rehearsal process and work within a fast-paced ensemble environment.

Performances will take place on **8th and 9th August 2026** at the **Barons Court Theatre, London**.

This is an **independent, low-budget profit-share production**, developed by producer and actress **Ioanna Firaku** and director/co-producer **Una Reitere**. Performers will be paid through shared ticket-sale profits. While finances are modest, we are committed to creating a focused, collaborative, and artistically ambitious production.

ROLES AVAILABLE

Creon, Teiresias/Guard and Haemon

We strongly encourage performers of all backgrounds, ethnicities, genders, and abilities to apply. Casting will be inclusive and non-traditional, and all performers should be open to collaborative ensemble and chorus work.

As this production has already undergone an initial development and performance process, we are especially interested in actors who are adaptable, proactive, and confident learning material quickly.

Some roles are text-heavy and require strong memorisation skills, emotional range, physicality, and stamina.

REHEARSALS & PERFORMANCE

* Rehearsals will take place **in person in Highgate, London**.
* Rehearsal dates will be confirmed following casting selections, but rehearsals are expected to take place across **May, June, July and first week of August 2026***.
* Performances will take place on **8th & 9th August 2026**.
* Venue: **Barons Court Theatre, London**.
* Production presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**.

TO APPLY

Please email **antigone.production2026@gmail.com **with:

* The role(s) you would like to be considered for
* A headshot and CV and/or Spotlight link

Selected applicants will be sent a short self-tape audition script.

**Application deadline:** 20/05/2026 midnight

If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out via email.

Thank you,
**Ioanna & Una **

Hi everyone! I’ll be in Berlin from June 1 to June 5.

I’m looking for female models and dancers for TFP photo shoots during this time.

I mainly shoot female portraits and dance photography, in urban streets or in nature.

If you’re interested, feel free to DM me 😊
IG: @hughleo1994

Please include your photos or IG when messaging.

items.text:
Hi, I'm Dani, a film photographer and part of Flare, an analog photography collective for women and dissidences with presence in Chile, France and Canada. 

We run open calls, photography gatherings and collaborative editorials where different artistic practices intersect — and we're hoping to bring it all together in a photobook in the future. We're now looking to connect with people in Berlin and build something here too — so if you're into analog photography, this is your invitation 💛

This Sunday May 10th we're opening a Mother's Day call: desired motherhood, not-so-desired, imposed, dissident. All perspectives welcome — emotional, conceptual, abstract, entirely your own. Analog format only.

Form closes Sunday May 10th:
🕛 12:00 Santiago & Valdivia, Chile
🕛 12:00 Toronto, Canada 
🕕 19:00 Toulouse, France 
🕕 19:00 Berlin, Germany 

📋 English form: https://forms.gle/j2DnPfsZRfwqm8je6
📋 Español: https://forms.gle/CELnomRbLHqZ2EB26
📋 Français: https://forms.gle/4dnp2pZSfec7LDTh7 

✶

Photography: https://www.instagram.com/jopipemi

✶

https://www.instagram.com/flare.analogo/

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I'm a photographer based in Berlin and I'm planning a series of fashion shoots around the city in the next few months, and am looking for fresh, up and coming Make Up Artists, Hair Stylists and Stylists interested in joining these projects.

These are tfp shoots, which is why they're a good occasion for younger talents to join me and my fun lovely little team! :)

Just hit me up if you're interested!

Cheers

(you can find my work on lalefavre.com)

✨ IRAQI DANCE TRAINING ONLINE ✨

Ya están disponibles los nuevos packs de entrenamiento online de Iraqi Dance 💫

▫️3 niveles disponibles
▫️Diferentes temáticas y estilos
▫️Clases grabadas para hacer a tu ritmo y según tu disponibilidad

Cada clase incluye:
🔥 Técnica
🔥 Secuencia
🔥 Mini coreografía

Una propuesta pensada para que puedas entrenar y adquirir conocimientos de la esencia Iraqi desde cualquier lugar 🌙

💛 Nivel principiante
💛 Nivel intermedio
💛 Packs combinados

Podés acceder a las clases mediante link privado ✨

Info e inscripciones por MD 📩

Cologne: June 22th

Application: castingvhn@yahoo.com

items.text:
Hi! Wir sind Souk Social (Social Media Agentur aus Wien) und suchen neue Brandfaces für bezahlte Shootings
für verschiedenste Unternehmen (Restaurants, Ärzte, Retail, etc.).

💸 15–30 € / Stunde
📍 WIEN
📹 Reels & TikTok
✨ kein Schauspiel nötig

Interesse?
Mail an: connect@souk-social.at

Bitte mit:
Name, Alter, Telefon, Instagram, Bild, Erfahrung + Deutsch-Level

Wir melden uns innerhalb weniger Tage 🙌
